datasets.name: 55341bda
queryLines:
SELECT 
    user_identity AS user_name,
    COUNT(*) AS activity_count,
    MAX(event_time) AS last_activity_time
FROM 
    system.access.audit
WHERE 
    --action_name IN ('LOGIN', 'RUN_NOTEBOOK', 'SUBMIT_JOB')
GROUP BY 
    user_identity
ORDER BY 
    activity_count DESC;

datasets.name: 9f06ec90
queryLines:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time) AS date, 
    action_name,
    user_identity.email AS distinct_user
FROM 
    system.access.audit
WHERE 
    event_time >= DATEADD(month, -12, CURRENT_DATE)
    --AND action_name IN ('tokenLogin')
    --AND user_identity.email LIKE '%katsantonis%'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time),
    action_name,
    user_identity.email
ORDER BY 
    date;

datasets.name: bdff3c9d
a35a5d9e
queryLines:
SELECT
  usage_month,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS MAU
FROM viz_team.dbrx_metrics.v_activity
GROUP BY usage_month
ORDER BY usage_month DESC;

datasets.name: 57965c17
queryLines:
WITH MONTHLY AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', usage_date) as usage_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS MAU
  FROM viz_team.dbrx_metrics.v_activity
  GROUP BY date_trunc('month', usage_date)
)
SELECT
 date_part('month', usage_month) month_used,
 mau,
 LAG(mau) OVER ( ORDER BY usage_month) AS prev_mau,
 mau - LAG(mau) OVER ( ORDER BY usage_month) AS net_change,
 CASE 
  WHEN LAG(mau) OVER ( ORDER BY usage_month) IS NULL THEN NULL
  WHEN mau > LAG(mau) OVER ( ORDER BY usage_month) THEN 'Increased'
  WHEN mau < LAG(mau) OVER ( ORDER BY usage_month) THEN 'Decreased'
  ELSE 'No Change'
END AS direction,
CASE 
  WHEN LAG(mau) OVER (ORDER BY usage_month) IS NULL OR LAG(mau) OVER ( ORDER BY usage_month) = 0 THEN NULL  
  ELSE ROUND(100.0 * (mau - LAG(mau) OVER ( ORDER BY usage_month)) / LAG(mau) OVER (ORDER BY usage_month), 2)
END AS pct_change
FROM monthly
ORDER BY usage_month DESC;

datasets.name: a0f992bf
queryLines:
--SELECT * FROM system.access.audit
SELECT event_id, user_identity.email as user_id,service_name, action_name, event_date, workspace_id, source_ip_address 
from system.access.audit
WHERE service_name not in ('syslog', 'monit', 'capsule8-alerts-dataplane')

datasets.name: cf40b0ed
queryLines:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time) AS date, 
    workspace_id,
    action_name,
    user_identity.email AS distinct_user
FROM 
    system.access.audit
WHERE 
    event_time >= DATEADD(month, -12, CURRENT_DATE)
    --AND action_name IN ('tokenLogin')
    --AND user_identity.email LIKE '%katsantonis%'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time),
    workspace_id,
    action_name,
   user_identity.email
ORDER BY 
    date, distinct_user;

datasets.name: 683e5c3f
queryLines:
SELECT 
  usage.usage_date, 
  usage.workspace_id,
  usage.sku_name, 
  usage.billing_origin_product, 
  usage.identity_metadata.owned_by, 
  --custom_tags,
  clusters.cluster_name,
  usage.usage_unit,
  SUM(usage.usage_quantity) AS sum_usage_quantity
FROM 
  system.billing.usage AS usage
LEFT JOIN
  system.compute.clusters AS clusters ON usage.usage_metadata.cluster_id = clusters.cluster_id
GROUP BY
  usage.usage_date, 
  usage.workspace_id,
  usage.sku_name, 
  usage.billing_origin_product, 
  usage.identity_metadata.owned_by, 
  --custom_tags,
  clusters.cluster_name,
  usage.usage_unit;

datasets.name: e341d078
queryLines:
WITH first_activity AS (
  SELECT 
    user_identity.email AS user_email,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time)) AS first_date
  FROM 
    system.access.audit
  GROUP BY 
    user_identity.email
  ORDER BY
    first_date
), 

daily_new_users AS (
  SELECT 
    first_date,
    COUNT(user_email) AS new_user_count
  FROM 
    first_activity
  GROUP BY
    first_date
  ORDER BY 
    first_date
)

SELECT 
  SUM(new_user_count) OVER (ORDER BY first_date) AS total_cumulative_users
FROM daily_new_users
ORDER BY first_date;



----NEW

WITH first_activity AS (
  SELECT 
    user_identity.email AS user_email,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time)) AS first_date
  FROM 
    system.access.audit
  GROUP BY 
    user_identity.email
), 

daily_new_users AS (
  SELECT 
    first_date,
    COUNT(user_email) AS new_user_count
  FROM 
    first_activity
  GROUP BY
    first_date
),

cumulative_users AS (
  SELECT 
    first_date,
    SUM(new_user_count) OVER (ORDER BY first_date) AS total_cumulative_users
  FROM 
    daily_new_users
),

daily_distinct_logins AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time) AS login_date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_identity.email) AS distinct_user_logins
  FROM 
    system.access.audit
  GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time)
)

SELECT 
  c.first_date AS date,
  c.total_cumulative_users,
  COALESCE(d.distinct_user_logins, 0) AS daily_distinct_user_logins,
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(d.distinct_user_logins, 0) * 100.0 / c.total_cumulative_users, 
    2
  ) AS login_percentage
FROM 
  cumulative_users c
LEFT JOIN 
  daily_distinct_logins d
ON 
  c.first_date = d.login_date
ORDER BY 
  c.first_date;

datasets.name: 55f3fbe3
queryLines:
--Clusters Usge in DBUs
SELECT 
   c.cluster_name,
   u.usage_quantity as DBUs
FROM system.billing.usage u
inner join system.compute.clusters c
 on u.workspace_id=c.workspace_id
 order by DBUs desc;

datasets.name: 0a4f307c
queryLines:
--Cluster Worker Nodes Count and Autoscaling Nodes
SELECT 
    cluster_id,
    cluster_name,
    worker_count as Worker_Nodes_Count,
    min_autoscale_workers as Min_Nodes,
    max_autoscale_workers Max_Nodes 
FROM system.compute.clusters; --306

datasets.name: 1a89e296
queryLines:
SELECT 
  we.workspace_id,
  we.warehouse_id,
  we.event_time,
  timestampdiff('MINUTE', we.event_time, current_timestamp()) / 60.0 AS running_hours,
  we.cluster_count
FROM system.compute.warehouse_events we
WHERE we.event_type = 'RUNNING'
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM compute.warehouse_events we2
        WHERE we2.warehouse_id = we warehouse_id
        AND we2.event_time > we event_time
      )
